info.title: dotnet-heroes-data
info.description: Extracts Heroes of the Storm game data into XML and JSON format

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Extract Heroes of the Storm game data into XML and JSON format

options.name: --description
options.description: Sets the description output type (0 - 6) - Default: 0.

options.name: --extract-images
options.description: Extracts image files, only available using the Heroes of the Storm game directory.

options.name: --localization
options.description: Sets the gamestring localization(s) - Default: enUS.

options.name: --threads
options.description: Limits the maximum amount of threads to use.

options.name: --file-split
options.description: Splits the XML and JSON file(s) into multiple files.

options.name: --localized-text
options.description: Extracts localized gamestrings from the XML and JSON file(s) into a text file.

options.name: --minify
options.description: Creates .min file(s) along with current output file(s).

arguments.name: storage-directory
arguments.description: The 'Heroes of the Storm' directory or an already extracted 'mods' directory.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Displays .txt, .xml, and .json files in the local directory.

options.name: --set-directory
options.description: Sets a relative directory to display

commands.name: read
commands.description: Reads a .txt, .xml, or .json file and displays its contents on screen.

arguments.name: file-name
arguments.description: The filename or relative file path to read and display on the console. Must be a .txt, .xml, or .json file.

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Extracts all required files from the `Heroes of the Storm` directory.

options.name: --xml-merge
options.description: Extracts the xml files as one file (excludes map files).

options.name: --png-compress
options.description: Sets a png image bit depth to 8 bits

arguments.name: file-name
arguments.description: The filename, file path, or directory containing the images to process.

commands.name: quick-compare
commands.description: Compares two directory contents or files and displays a list of changed files.

commands.name: localized-json
commands.description: Converts a localized gamestring file created from --localized-text to a json file.

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: Output directory to save the converted files to.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The file path of the file or directory to convert

commands.name: portrait-info
commands.description: Provides information from the reward portrait data.

options.name: --texture-sheets
options.description: Displays all the reward portraits image file names.

options.name: --icon-zero
options.description: Displays all the icon slot 0 names along with the image file name.

options.name: --portrait-names
options.description: Displays all the reward portrait names that are associated with the given texture sheet image name (from data file).

arguments.name: rewardportrait-file-path
arguments.description: The reward portrait data json file path.

commands.name: portrait-cache
commands.description: Obtains the portrait texture sheets from the battle.net cache.

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: Directory to save the texture sheets to.

arguments.name: cache-directory-path
arguments.description: The directory path of the battle.net cache

commands.name: portrait-extract
commands.description: Performs portrait extraction from the texture sheets.

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: Output directory to save the extracted files to.

options.name: --texture-sheet
options.description: The file name of a texture sheet from the texture-sheet-directory-path argument.

options.name: --prompt
options.description: Displays list of portrait names then prompts for original file.

options.name: --delete-file
options.description: Deletes the texture sheet after images have been extracted.

arguments.name: rewardportrait-file-path
arguments.description: The reward portrait data json file path.

arguments.name: texture-sheet-directory-path
arguments.description: The directory path of the saved texture sheets (the copied files from the battle.net cache).

arguments.name: image-file-name
arguments.description: The texture sheet image name (from data file) to extract images from.

commands.name: portrait-auto-extract
commands.description: Auto extracts the portraits from the battle.net cache or a copied directory.

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: Directory to save the extracted portraits.

options.name: --xml-config
options.description: Sets the xml file used for the auto extracting.

options.name: --delete-file
options.description: Deletes the texture sheet after images have been extracted.

arguments.name: rewardportrait-file-path
arguments.description: The reward portrait data json file path.

arguments.name: cache-directory-path
arguments.description: The directory path of the battle.net cache or an another directory containing the files (.wafl or .dds).
